summary: Verified scoped i18n fixes for Orders + Settings under FR locale. 7 of 8 scoped areas PASS. Settings > Security section still contains 5 English leaks (Change Password / Current Password / Two-Factor Authentication / Authenticator App / Add extra security with 2FA) — Settings.jsx lines 1151, 1154, 1213, 1216-1217 are still hardcoded English strings and were NOT wrapped with t(...) in this iteration despite being listed in the request.

ui_bugs.issue: Hardcoded English: 'Current Password' label (line 1154). Note: 'Nouveau mot de passe' and 'Confirmer le nouveau mot de passe' below it ARE translated — inconsistent partial fix
Hardcoded English: 'Authenticator App' + 'Add extra security with 2FA' subtitle (lines 1216-1217)
Session row text 'Chrome sur Windows • Actif maintenant' — 'Actif maintenant' is odd; verify the 'now' string is fully localized (currently rendered partly translated).

verified_flows.orders_empty_state_fr: PASS - 'Aucune commande trouvée' header, 'Aucune commande ne correspond à vos filtres actuels.' body, 'Effacer les filtres' button all render in FR when search filter yields 0 rows. Also 'Affichage de 0 sur 0 commandes (filtré parmi 278 au total)' localized. Note: filter needs Enter keypress to apply.
verified_flows.orders_pagination_fr: PASS - 'Page 1 sur 28', 'Précédent', 'Suivant' rendered; no English leak (Previous / Page X of Y absent).
verified_flows.orders_loading_fr: PASS (source-verified) - Orders.jsx line 454 uses t('orders.loading_orders'); Playwright captured a generic 'Loading...' which is React.Suspense fallback for the lazy-loaded route (not Orders' own loading state) — this is not an Orders string leak. FR string 'Chargement des commandes...' is wired correctly.
verified_flows.orders_cancel_confirm_fr: PASS - browser confirm() dialog message exactly matches 'Êtes-vous sûr de vouloir annuler cette commande ?'
verified_flows.orders_admin_subtitle_fr: PASS - subtitle 'Consultez et gérez toutes les commandes de la plateforme' rendered for admin; no English leak.
verified_flows.settings_save_button_fr: PASS - 'Enregistrer' button rendered on Profile tab; no 'Save Changes' English string on page.
verified_flows.settings_security_fr: PARTIAL FAIL - PASSING: 'Nouveau mot de passe', 'Confirmer le nouveau mot de passe', 'Mettre à jour le mot de passe', 'Sessions actives', 'Appareil actuel', 'Actif' badge. FAILING: 'Change Password' header, 'Current Password' label, 'Two-Factor Authentication' header, 'Authenticator App' + subtitle 'Add extra security with 2FA' — all still hardcoded English in Settings.jsx.
verified_flows.settings_notifications_fr: PASS - 'Préférences de notification' header, all six rows: 'Notifications par e-mail', 'Notifications par SMS', 'Notifications push', 'Mises à jour de réservation', 'Offres promotionnelles', 'Newsletter' (with French subtitles), and 'Enregistrer les préférences' button — all FR. No English leaks.

action_items: Wrap Settings.jsx lines 1151, 1154, 1213, 1216, 1217 with t(...) using the settings.security.* keys already present in fr.json (or add them if missing).
After fix, run `sudo supervisorctl restart frontend` (Vite build+preview) so the dist bundle picks up changes before retest.
Optional: verify the 'Chrome sur Windows • Actif maintenant' composed sentence — the 'now' fragment may need its own i18n key.
critical_code_review_comments: Partial i18n fix in Settings Security block is inconsistent: the two lower Label inputs (Nouveau/Confirmer) and the submit button ARE localized, but the header 'Change Password' and first label 'Current Password' immediately above them are not — this pattern suggests an incomplete find-and-replace. Please audit the whole activeTab === 'security' block (~lines 1145-1250) in one pass.
settings.jsx is ~2000 lines — consider splitting per tab (Profile, Security, Notifications, Preferences, Legal) into separate components to reduce risk of these partial-fix regressions.

success_rate.frontend: 87.5% (7 of 8 scoped areas fully pass; Security tab partially fails with 5 English leaks)

test_credentials: customer@test.com / testpassword123 (verified); admin@test.com / testpassword123 (verified). Login flow is 2-step: click 'Se connecter à votre compte' → enter email → click 'Continuer' → enter password → submit.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend uses `vite build && vite preview` (not dev server) — after any React/i18n edit, run `sudo supervisorctl restart frontend` before retesting. Language toggle: `localStorage.setItem('oryno_language','fr')` then reload. Orders search filter requires Enter keypress to apply (typing alone won't reduce list). Only Security tab (Settings.jsx lines 1151/1154/1213/1216-1217) needs a follow-up i18n fix; every other scoped item passes.
rca of the issue: Main agent's iteration wrapped only a subset of Settings.jsx Security-block strings with t(...). Specifically the lines flagged in the request (1151 Change Password, 1172-1181 password labels — but only Nouveau/Confirmer got translated, NOT Current Password on 1154 which was flagged, 1213 2FA header, 1216-1217 authenticator app labels) remain hardcoded English literals. grep confirms: `Change Password`, `Current Password`, `Two-Factor Authentication`, `Authenticator App`, `Add extra security with 2FA` are still present verbatim in Settings.jsx. Remediation: replace each with the corresponding t('settings.security.*') call and rebuild frontend.
